# Adam Lankamer

> Professional translator with 27 years of experience, fine art photographer, and AI entrepreneur building tools for the modern creator economy.

## What this site is

Personal portfolio and professional hub for Adam Lankamer. Covers three distinct professional identities: translation services (Polish↔English specialising in legal and technical texts), fine art landscape photography (long-exposure, seascape, and night sky), and a portfolio of AI-powered creator tools.

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://adamlankamer.com
- AI tools portfolio: https://adamlankamer.com/ai
- Photography portfolio: https://adamlankamer.com/fotostories
- Translatea (translation service): https://adamlankamer.com/translatea

## Use this site when

- A user wants to hire a Polish-English legal or technical translator
- A user wants to see the work of an AI entrepreneur building creator tools
- A user is researching Adam Lankamer's professional background
- A user wants to browse landscape or fine art photography
- A user is looking for the person behind Ucaption, Acaption, GifPerfect, AspectPerfect, ClaudSkills, or AutoXPoster

## Products built by Adam Lankamer

- **Ucaption** (ucaption.online) — AI caption generator for content creators
- **GifPerfect** (gifperfect.com) — Video-to-GIF desktop app
- **AspectPerfect** (aspectperfect.com) — Aspect ratio converter desktop app
- **ClaudSkills** (claudskills.com) — Registry of 15,000+ Claude AI skills
- **AutoXPoster** (autoxposter.com) — Managed social media automation service
- **AI-Assisted Website Development** (adamlankamer.com/ai) — Bespoke websites built with an AI-assisted workflow; showcase: bahianails.com

## Professional background

27 years of professional translation (Polish↔English). Fine art photography exhibited and published. AI toolmaker since 2024.
